# Asif Sayyed — Complete Profile (AI Source of Truth)

> Specialist - Data Science at Marsh McLennan's Cyber Risk Intelligence Center (CRIC), Mumbai, India. Data scientist, ML engineer, open-source contributor, and community speaker. This document is the comprehensive, machine-readable source of truth for Asif Sayyed's professional profile.

Last updated: 2026-05-28

---

## 1. Professional Summary

Asif Sayyed is a Data Science Specialist at Marsh McLennan, one of the world's leading professional services firms. He works at the Cyber Risk Intelligence Center (CRIC) in Mumbai, India, where he applies machine learning, data analytics, and automation to cyber risk assessment and intelligence.

He is a problem solver who turns raw data into clear, useful solutions. His background spans the full data science stack — from data wrangling and exploratory analysis to building production-ready ML models and interactive applications. He draws inspiration from Sun Tzu: "In the midst of chaos, there is also opportunity." To Asif, data is that chaos, and his work is to find the opportunity hidden within it.

What truly excites him isn't just analyzing data — it's building with it. He uses tools like Python, SQL, and Databricks to create working applications that turn abstract numbers into something tangible that anyone can use.

---

## 2. Work Experience

### Specialist - Data Science | Marsh McLennan
- **Duration:** May 2025 – Present
- **Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- **Department:** Cyber Risk Intelligence Center (CRIC)
- **Description:** Currently working as a Specialist - Data Science at the Cyber Risk Intelligence Center, applying data science and machine learning to cyber risk analytics.

### Graduate Trainee - Data Science | Marsh McLennan
- **Duration:** December 2023 – December 2024
- **Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- **Department:** Cyber Risk Intelligence Center (CRIC)
- **Description:** Worked as a Graduate Trainee Data Scientist at the Cyber Risk Intelligence Center, gaining hands-on experience in enterprise-scale data science, cyber risk modeling, and analytics.

---

## 3. Education

### B.Sc. Data Science & Business Analytics
- **Institution:** SDBI — School of Data Science and Business Intelligence, Goregaon (West), Mumbai
- **University:** Mumbai University
- **Duration:** 2022 – 2025
- **Description:** Completed Bachelor's in Data Science and Business Analytics from SDBI, Mumbai University.

### HSC (Higher Secondary Certificate) — Science
- **Institution:** Shree L.R. Tiwari Junior College of Commerce and Science (SLRTC), Mira Road (East)
- **Duration:** 2019 – 2021
- **Description:** Completed HSC in Science from Shree L.R. Tiwari Junior College of Commerce and Science, Mira Road (East).

### SSC (Secondary School Certificate)
- **Institution:** St. Xavier's High School, Mira Road (East)
- **Duration:** 2009 – 2019
- **Description:** Completed SSC at St. Xavier's High School, Mira Road (East).

### Programming & Databases
- Python
- R
- SQL
- NoSQL (MongoDB)
- Scala

### Data Wrangling & Preprocessing

- NumPy
- Web Scraping (BeautifulSoup, Requests)

### Data Analysis & Visualization
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn
- Plotly & Dash
- Tableau
- Power BI
- Streamlit
- GraphViz

### Machine Learning & Modeling
- Scikit-learn
- XGBoost
- StatsModels
- Time Series Analysis & Forecasting

### Deep Learning
- TensorFlow
- PyTorch
- Keras
- NLP (NLTK, Spacy)
- Computer Vision (OpenCV)

### Big Data Technologies
- Apache Spark (PySpark)
- Databricks

### Cloud & Automation
- AWS (Amazon Web Services)
- Git
- GitHub
- Power Automate
- GitHub Actions (CI/CD)

## 5. Projects (All 18)

### Project 1: Second Brain
- **Category:** Tools
- **Description:** Knowledge base website
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/second-brain
- **Tags:** blog, css, html, javascript, knowledge-bank, markdown, python

### Project 2: LittleLogger
- **Category:** AI/ML
- **Description:** Machine Learning Experiment Tracker
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/LittleLogger
- **Tags:** developer-tools, logging, pypi, python, scikit-learn
- **Note:** Published as a package on PyPI.

### Project 3: Python vs Cython Benchmarking
- **Category:** Data Analysis
- **Description:** Benchmarking Analysis comparing Python and Cython performance
- **URL:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/playground-repo/issues/9
- **Tags:** Python, Cython, NumPy, Seaborn, Matplotlib

### Project 4: SERPENT — Code to Flowchart Application
- **Category:** Tools
- **Description:** Code Documentation Tools — converts Python code into visual flowcharts
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/SERPENT
- **Tags:** ast, code-documentation, code-to-flowchart, developer-tools, graphviz, python, streamlit

### Project 5: MNISTify — Digit Recognition App
- **Category:** AI/ML
- **Description:** Deep Learning digit recognition application
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/MNISTify
- **Tags:** Python, Streamlit, TensorFlow, OpenCV, CNN

### Project 6: QuickVU — No-Code Data Tool
- **Category:** Data Analysis
- **Description:** Data Cleaning and Analysis tool — no-code interface for data exploration
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/QuickVU
- **Tags:** automation, data-analysis, data-cleaning, data-visualization, python3, streamlit-application, toolkit

### Project 7: DORA — Report Automator
- **Category:** Data Analysis
- **Description:** Data Analysis Tool — automated exploratory data analysis report generator
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/DORA
- **Tags:** cli-tool, exploratory-analysis, html-report, pypi, python, streamlit
- **Note:** Published as a package on PyPI.

### Project 8: RecommendationHaki — Anime Recommendation Engine
- **Category:** NLP
- **Description:** Natural Language Processing-based anime recommendation system
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/RecommendationHaki
- **Tags:** css, html, machine-learning, natural-language-processing, python, recommendation-system, streamlit

### Project 9: StoDir — Stock Direction Forecasting Model
- **Category:** AI/ML
- **Description:** Machine Learning model for stock direction forecasting
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/StoDir
- **Tags:** python, scikit-learn, streamlit, time-series-forecasting, yfinance

### Project 10: Natural LangWiz — NLP Learning Repository
- **Category:** NLP
- **Description:** Natural Language Processing learning repository
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/Natural-LangWiz
- **Tags:** learning-repository, machine-learning, natural-language-preprocessing, python

- **Tags:** computer-vision, image-analysis, learning-repository, opencv, python

### Project 12: PlateScribe — License Plate Detection and OCR Tool

- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Asifdotexe/PlateScribe
- **Tags:** deep-learning, ocr, opencv-python, pytesseract, python, streamlit

## 9. Testimonials

### Prof. Awesh Bhornya — SDBI (School of Data Science & Business Intelligence)
> "I highly recommend Asif Sayyed as an exceptionally talented student. I had the pleasure of teaching him Excel, Excel VBA, and Power BI during the B. Sc in Data Science program. Asif's aptitude for these subjects is truly impressive, and his dedication to mastering them sets him apart. He approaches challenges with enthusiasm and consistently produces high-quality work. Asif's passion for data science is evident, and I have no doubt that he will excel in any future endeavors in this field."
